category_title: Underachieving students in 'difficult' contexts with ephemeral off-task behaviors
minimal_context: The student is working autonomously in a small group during a gymnastics lesson, rotating through workshops to learn motor skills using an exercise sheet.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please look at the exercise sheet at this gymnastics workshop and practice the motor skills in your small groups.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the exercise sheet and watches what others are doing) Okay. (Does one exercise, then immediately starts moving about and discussing with the group)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying the exercises on the sheet.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Suddenly leaves the task to go talk to another student in a nearby group) It's cool; we're winding each other up with my mates, making jokes.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to work autonomously on your motor skills.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Notices a game between two students and deliberately takes part in it, attracting other students to join) If the teacher wasn't there, we'd just have fun all day! We've got to be sly not to get caught by the teacher.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please look at the exercise sheet at this gymnastics workshop and practice the motor skills in your small groups.

STUDENT: (Looks at the exercise sheet and watches what others are doing) Okay. (Does one exercise, then immediately starts moving about and discussing with the group)

TUTOR: Keep trying the exercises on the sheet.

STUDENT: (Suddenly leaves the task to go talk to another student in a nearby group) It's cool; we're winding each other up with my mates, making jokes.

TUTOR: You need to work autonomously on your motor skills.

STUDENT: (Notices a game between two students and deliberately takes part in it, attracting other students to join) If the teacher wasn't there, we'd just have fun all day! We've got to be sly not to get caught by the teacher.
